title: Introducing Yourself
script: My name is Linh. I am from Vietnam. I am a student at a language school.
hint: Say your name, country, and what you do.

title: Talking about Daily Routine
script: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30. I brush my teeth, take a shower, and eat breakfast.
hint: Use simple present tense to describe your morning.

title: Describing Your Hometown
script: I live in Da Nang. It is a beautiful coastal city with beaches and mountains.
hint: Mention your city and what it is known for.

title: Asking for Directions
script: Excuse me, how can I get to the nearest bus station?

title: Ordering at a Restaurant
script: I would like a chicken sandwich and a glass of orange juice, please.

title: Talking about Hobbies
script: In my free time, I enjoy reading books and going for walks in the park.
hint: List your hobbies using present simple.

title: Making an Appointment
script: Can I make an appointment with the doctor for tomorrow at 10 a.m.?
hint: Ask clearly about time and purpose.

title: Describing a Picture
script: In the picture, there is a family having a picnic in the park. The weather is sunny.
hint: Describe what you see and where.

title: Giving Opinions
script: I think studying English every day is very helpful.
hint: Use 'I think' to express your opinion.

title: Expressing Future Plans
script: Next weekend, I am going to visit my grandparents in the countryside.
